intro: Spidey decided to hit the slopes this winter, but things really went DOWNHILL from there.
caption: I nudged a small pile of snow at the top of the mountain while he adjusted his goggles at the bottom and waited for it to reach him.
hidden_touch: A tiny hot cocoa mug sitting on a lodge windowsill; a little flag at the top of the ski run labeled 'BUNNY SLOPE'
scene_description: A snowy mountain slope in flat white and blue. Spidey stands at the bottom in tiny goggles and a scarf, skis on his feet. A massive wall of spray-painted white snow tumbles toward him from above. The ski lodge sits in the background with a lit window and tiny cocoa mug on the sill. A small flag at the top of the hill reads BUNNY SLOPE.

intro: Spidey was really looking forward to the show, but unfortunately the feature presentation LEFT A MARK on him.
caption: I shook the vintage projector loose from its mount in the booth above him while he sat in the front row eating popcorn.
hidden_touch: A tiny now-playing marquee outside reading 'CHARLOTTE'S WEB'; a half-eaten box of Junior Mints on the armrest beside Spidey
scene_description: A dark red movie theater interior. Rows of flat-colored seats recede into the background. Spidey sits alone in the very front row, a tiny popcorn bucket in two of his legs, a box of Junior Mints on the armrest. A large boxy projector falls from the upper booth trailing a single beam of white light. The marquee visible through the lobby window reads CHARLOTTE'S WEB.

intro: Our buddy was just enjoying a stroll across the green, but he really got caught up in someone else's DRIVE.
caption: I teed up a golf ball directly on top of him and swung.
hidden_touch: A tiny golf cart parked near the flag with a little striped umbrella on it; a scorecard on the ground nearby with every hole marked as a zero
scene_description: A flat bright green golf course under a blue sky with a spray-painted puffy cloud. A golf tee sits in the center of the scene with Spidey pinned beneath a white golf ball, eyes wide, mid-step. A large wooden golf club swings in from the side. A striped flag marks a hole in the distance. A small golf cart with a yellow umbrella sits to the right. A scorecard on the grass has a neat row of zeros.

intro: Spidey was due for a little trim, but the whole visit turned into quite a HAIR-RAISING experience.
caption: I switched on the salon floor vacuum while he sat in the styling chair waiting for his appointment and let it find him.
hidden_touch: A wall-mounted poster of a spider with a very stylish blowout hairdo; a little tip jar on the counter labeled 'TIPS' with one coin in it
scene_description: A bright pink hair salon. A big padded styling chair sits in the center with Spidey in it, a tiny cape around his neck, looking pleased. A large industrial canister vacuum rolls across the checkered floor toward him, nozzle outstretched and hungry. Clippings of gray hair dot the floor. On the wall hangs a poster of a spider with a voluminous blowout. A tip jar on the counter holds a single coin.

intro: Spidey was absolutely in AWE of the marine life on display, which is to say he really got a little TOO CLOSE to the exhibits.
caption: I dropped him into the large open-top tank while he leaned over the railing to get a better look at the fish inside.
hidden_touch: A gift shop sign in the background advertising 'SPIDER MAGNETS $4.99'; a small plaque on the tank that reads 'DO NOT TAP GLASS'
scene_description: A dark blue aquarium hall. A massive rectangular fish tank dominates the scene, glowing teal with flat-colored fish swimming inside. One enormous orange fish near the surface has its mouth wide open. Spidey tumbles downward from the railing above, arms splayed, tiny wide eyes, mid-fall. A plaque on the tank reads DO NOT TAP GLASS. In the background a gift shop sign reads SPIDER MAGNETS $4.99.
